data.content:
Planning complete. Implementation plan attached as note. Three child knots created:
- 4264: Domain logic + app methods (pure edit functions, App methods, events)
- 5c47: CLI subcommands + write dispatch (kno plan wave/step commands, blocked_by 4264)
- 18c0: Interactive cascade delete prompts (TTY detection, --force flag, blocked_by 5c47)
Dependency chain: 4264 -> 5c47 -> 18c0. Total estimated ~800 lines across ~6 new files. No schema changes needed - reuses existing ExecutionPlanData and KnotExecutionPlanDataSet event.
